vocab.meaning: thúc đẩy kết nối kỹ thuật số
vocab.example: Messaging websites have acted to catalyze digital connectivity among the elderly population in my country recently.

vocab.meaning: các công cụ tìm kiếm phổ biến khắp nơi
vocab.example: Google remains one of the ubiquitous search engines that serves as the primary gateway to information for most citizens.

vocab.meaning: kho lưu trữ các bài báo học thuật
vocab.example: Academic websites serving as a repository of scholarly articles are gaining ground among university students nationwide.

vocab.meaning: các cổng thông tin khám chữa bệnh từ xa
vocab.example: There has been a notable rise in telemedicine portals, allowing residents to consult with specialists without traveling to the capital.

vocab.meaning: các danh mục tin rao vặt và niêm yết
vocab.example: For those looking to buy second-hand goods, local classifieds and listing directories are still the most trusted avenues.

vocab.meaning: thu hút/chiếm lĩnh một lượng khán giả khổng lồ
vocab.example: Entertainment sites that feature celebrity gossip often command a vast audience across various age groups.

vocab.meaning: giao diện môi giới chứng khoán
vocab.example: With the retail investing boom, web-based stock brokerage interfaces have become essential tools for young professionals.

vocab.meaning: các trang web học ngôn ngữ
vocab.example: Language acquisition websites are incredibly popular as there is a profound collective desire to master English for career advancement.

vocab.meaning: hệ thống theo dõi hậu cần/vận chuyển
vocab.example: Since the boom in home deliveries, logistical tracking systems integrated into websites have become a daily touchpoint for consumers.

vocab.meaning: các diễn đàn gắn kết cộng đồng/dân sự
vocab.example: Local civic engagement forums provide a space for residents to discuss urban planning and neighborhood safety issues.
